name: sorbic acid
description: A mild preservative that inhibits mold, yeast, and fungal growth to extend shelf life
raw_text: Sorbic Acid (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Sorbic Acid What-it-does: preservative Official CosIng Information All Functions: preservative CAS #: 110-44-1 | EC #: 203-768-7 Ph. Eur. Name: Acidum Sorbicum | Chemical/IUPAC Name: Hexa-2,4-Dienoic Acid Cosmetic Restrictions: V/4 Details A mild, natural preservative that usually comes to the formula together with its other mild preservative friends, such as Benzoic Acid and/or Dehydroacetic Acid . Btw, it's also used as a food preservative. [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
